v1_section_reference: v1 §6 Non-Goals 'add new features — only reorganizes and unifies existing capabilities'
notes: v1 §6's 'no new features' framing was the framing under which the implementation hedge happened (extraction-only scope, no multi-tool dispatch). v2 §6 replaces with 'realizes the canonical body's commitments (FEAT-005/006/DEC-0047/TASK-091/JI-029) at the agent layer.' DEC-0004's dual-mode dispatch IS new framework capability relative to v1's extraction-only scope; explicitly so per canonical-body alignment.
